title: Recalls
description: Adds recall potions from Terraria along with two additional potions! A replacement for /home and /back!
body:
# **Recalls**
**Recalls** is a Data Pack that adds the Recall Potion and Return Potion from the game Terraria.
There is also a third potion called the "Potion of Death Recall" which isn't from Terraria but rather an idea I had while making the original Potion of Recall.

Here are the potions and what they do:
- Potion of Recall
  - Teleports you to your spawnpoint.
- Potion of Death Return
  - Teleports you to your last death location.
- Potion of Return
  - Teleports you to your spawnpoint and creates a portal back to the original location. (Careful using this in multiplayer, other people can, and probably will, steal your portal back, leaving you at your spawnpoint.)

In order to make one of the potions easier to make, the Wither's loot table was modified to drop 3-5 wither roses upon death.

You will unlock the recipes in the recipe book when you either obtain the special ingredient for the specific potion, or you obtain nether wart which will unlock all of them.
#
 There are two version of the datapack, stackable and unstackable. Stackable is the normal, base version that allows for the three potions to be stacked up to 16. Unstackable is a slightly modified version that only changes one thing, the three potions cannot be stacked. This is to accomodate for people who may think stacking them is too overpowered, so I created a version where they aren't stackable.
